title: Cobblemon Explorers SMP
description: For the Cobblemon Explorers: SMP Server
body:
# For Cobblemon Explorers: SMP Server

A perfect blend of Farming, Cobblemon and Minecraft all into one handpicked modpack. Very minimal mods are on client side that are required for the server which include 


+ Cobblemon
+ Cobblemon Mega Showdown
+ Trinkets + Dependancy
+ Sophisticted backpacks + Dependancy

Many Client side QOL features such as:
+ Whimscape Resource pack ( with block and entity changes and without )
+ Particle Effects
+ Antique Atlas (required dependancy on server side or wont work)
+ Better Third Person
+ Shaders
+ Visual enhancing Resource packs 
+ Cobblemon + Music + Sound effects
+ Inventory Sorting (required server side or wont work)
+ Performance mods like Sodium + Lithium + Ferrite core + Culling and more
+ Trash Slot (required serverside or wont do anything)
+ Minimap
+ Polymer
+ Zoomify
+ +More !


**CLICK [HERE](https://bisecthosting.com/PokeSteam) AND USE CODE **PokeSteam** FOR 25% OFF A SERVER!**
![clickhere](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c77fec9ced60864f08653471c8fc1ebd27dab685.webp)
